[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [filters](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeFilterManager](../../TextmodeFilterManager.md) / unregister

# Method: unregister()

```ts
unregister(id): boolean;
```

Unregister a filter by its ID.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `id` | `string` | The filter ID to unregister |

## Returns

`boolean`

true if the filter was unregistered, false if it wasn't found
